title: paspalum campylostachyum
intro: Paspalum campylostachyum is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paspalum campylostachyum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Paspalum campylostachyum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
